name: LiveChat API
what_it_does: Customer service platform with comprehensive developer API — providing live chat, ticketing, and omnichannel messaging with REST and RTM (Real-Time Messaging) APIs for building custom integrations, agent tools, and chat automation.
use_cases: Building custom LiveChat integrations via Marketplace and REST API for CRM sync
Accessing conversation transcripts and agent activity data for reporting
Creating webhooks for real-time chat events (new chat, agent joined, message) in pipelines
Building custom agent tools using LiveChat Agent App SDK
Exporting chat history and customer data for analytics pipelines
not_for: Simple single-page chat widget without integration needs (simpler tools exist)
Marketing automation with complex email sequences (use Customer.io)
Enterprise contact center with complex routing and ACD (use Genesys or Five9)
best_when: A support team needs developer-first live chat with comprehensive API for building custom integrations, agent apps, and data pipelines.
avoid_when: You need pure marketing automation, complex voice support, or a simpler chat widget without integration needs.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for third-party apps. Personal Access Tokens (PATs) for direct API use. Scoped access: read chats, write chats, admin. Agent-level vs account-level token distinction. LiveChat marketplace apps use OAuth2 flow.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $20/agent/month; Team from $41/agent/month; Business from $59/agent/month
pricing.notes: Agent-based pricing. No free tier. Credit card required for trial. Polish company (Wrocław) — Text group. Same company as ChatBot, HelpDesk, and KnowledgeBase. Strong developer ecosystem with marketplace. 37,000+ businesses.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per endpoint; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Excellent developer documentation — one of the best in live chat. REST Management API + RTM (websocket) for real-time events. OAuth2 with scopes. JavaScript/Python/PHP/Ruby SDKs. Webhook support. Agent App SDK for building embedded tools. Comprehensive API surface.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Chat reads idempotent. Message sends create new messages — not idempotent. Agent management operations idempotent. Webhook registration idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Credit card required for trial — barrier for automated testing
REST vs RTM (real-time) APIs serve different use cases — choose appropriately
OAuth2 scopes must be requested in app registration — cannot add scopes without re-auth
Marketplace app approval required for OAuth2 app publishing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. HIPAA available. OAuth2 with scopes. US and EU data residency. PAT for automation, OAuth2 for user-facing apps. Polish company with strong EU privacy culture. Agent-level access control.
